message:
feat(python): numpy.tril wrapper parity (franken_numpy-hi3h)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.tril(m, k=0) so lower-triangular
extraction matches numpy across square matrix k=0/1/-1, rectangular
(3,5), 3-D batch (preserves leading axes), and float dtype parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
